World Map Variants

All six maps use the same traced world coastline data. The differences here are proportional tuning, island filtering, line weight, and background mood.

01 Clean

Plain warm-cream background. Closest to a traced reference map.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-clean.svg

02 Paper

Clean map with subtle aged-paper grain.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-paper.svg

03 Sea Mist

Pale teal atmosphere behind the Eurasia-Africa belt.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-mist.svg

04 Dawn Wash

Soft terracotta warmth from the lower-left edge.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-dawn.svg

05 Atlas Plate

Slight vignette and paper texture, still restrained.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-atlas.svg

06 Romantic

Most illustrative: paper grain, teal mist, and a warm dawn glow.

w00-ch001-map-early-civilization-cradles-romantic.svg
